title: Todo priorities

acceptance_criteria.statement: WHEN add(title, priority) is called with priority high, normal, or low, THE SYSTEM SHALL store that priority; WHEN priority is omitted, THE SYSTEM SHALL default it to normal.
WHEN items() is called, THE SYSTEM SHALL return todos ordered high before normal before low, preserving insertion order within a priority.
IF add() receives a priority outside {high, normal, low}, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL raise ValueError and store nothing.

contracts: TodoList.items() -> list[dict] sorted by priority rank then insertion

quality.non_goals: no persistence changes, no CLI changes, no due dates

rollout.rollback: git revert of the candidate commits
